message:
Add CLI table/completion and TUI tokens style tests

Cover StyledTable builder chain (NewStyledTable, WithTitle, WithFooter,
WithStyle, AddRow, RowCount, Render, String), padRight, runeWidth,
message formatters (Success/Error/Warning/Info/SectionHeader/Divider/
KeyValue/Badge/SubtleText/BoldText/AccentText), completeCommaSeparated,
prefixMatches, plus 20 TUI tokens.go style builders (UltraWide,
GetLayoutMode, AdaptiveCardDimensions, PanelStyle, HeaderStyle,
ListItemStyle, KeyBadgeStyle, KeyDescStyle, MutedStyle, ErrorStyle,
SuccessStyle, WarningStyle, InfoStyle, BoldStyle, SectionTitleStyle,
DividerLineStyle, OverlayBoxStyle, FooterHintStyle, StatusBadgeStyle,
TableCellStyle, TableHeaderStyle, InlinePaddingStyle, BoxPaddingStyle,
CenteredStyle).

tui/styles: 88.7% → 91.8%

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
